title: /kit plugin
description: /kit mod for paper 1.21.11 servers that give you beginner gear
body: A lightweight beginner gear kit mod for Paper 1.21.11 servers that gives new players a balanced starter loadout, including lightly enchanted chainmail armor, a stone sword, and an iron pickaxe — perfect for getting started without being overpowered. Plus, there’s a hidden easter egg waiting to be discovered. If you find the easter egg, please don't spoil it for others.
